reviews.review_title: A whole ton of fun!! Great value!
reviews.review_description: This is a severely underrated, underhyped game. It is excellent for practice for other high-stakes headset archery games, as the bow physics seems consistent and well-integrated. Also, I turned off the aiming reticle to make it more authentic for "eyeballing" my shots. Outstanding, and a lot of variety from range to range.

I did archery for a few years and it is fun to be able do it in VR now with the physics of it so accurate. The only things I miss is the influence of wind as an option and perhaps a separate, modern setting with modern bows in a simple shooting range.

I do instinctive longbow shooting irl and was looking for something that feels similar with no fantasy elements. This fits that niche perfectly.  There's not a lot of frills but in this case that's a good thing. Still lots of stages and you can unlock various bows and arrows. The music is also pretty atmospheric for getting in that medieval mood. 100% recommended, especially at the low price.

I am just getting into archery and am having a blast with this game!  The feel of the medieval setting and music is awesome.  I'd would love to be able to create my own avatar in medieval garb.  I'd pay extra for that!!  Great game

reviews.review_title: The best archery fun on quest 2!!
reviews.review_description: Real good physics, small price and good fun! A Must Have for all bow and arrows nuts out there! Tons of fun but not so easy that it would be boring fast...  You really have to master your craft!
Playing this - and only this - for days now. I guess it also helps with posture.

reviews.review_title: Loves it but one thing missing!
reviews.review_description: It's an awesome game and one of the first I jumped onto and felt it was super intuitive and natural. I just wish it had a timer for the events with a top 10 board or something like that! Then my kids can know I'm the best haha 🤣
Loved it! Underrated game. Worth the purchase :)

This is a great game! I love archery, I don't do it in real life but I always wanted to do it. 
I bought the Shadow Show from Dead Eye VR, and it works really great, not perfect but it works. It's not aligned but once you press the trigger you don't notice it, you can shoot and feel the bow and the arrow goes where your controller is aiming. 
The game is amazing, really challenging, I enjoy all the levels, some are really hard but you can skip some and continue. 
I just hope the devs don't abandon this game, it's really great, I want to see more bows, arrows and more levels. Also a multiplayer option would be really good! 🏹

As someone with over a decade of shooting finger bows, both Olympic Recurve and barebow, this app is an absolute blast to use for practicing.  It won't give the real feeling of draw weight, but at least in terms of anchor and shooting it's pretty great.  My only critique is the tracking loss feature.  I like the arrow to be closer to the dominant eye, and it's great that you can override the default snap position.  However, the snap position x,y,z values don't seem to save when moving to a new target and needs to be set every single time (I prefer 0.08, 0.00, -0.10).  Otherwise, what a time killer game!
I've enjoyed this game so far I do wish it had more variety of things you could win and or load up and so I look forward to the future of more development but other than that it's been well worth it.

This game really challenges your coordination, focus and of course Marksman skills with a bow. I got pretty addicted to it, and it took me a couple of months to complete all 12 levels and stages with 3 stars in each.
Quest 2 helmet and controllers, limits the the handling of a bow in any game, but this one has an adjustment setting for that, makes it much better but not perfect. Would be nice with more levels and stages.
I’m an archer IRL, and the arrows flight path is stunningly close to real life arrows flight path.

I looked up on YouTube the best archery games on Quest 2 and to be honest, I was a bit disappointed to run only into FPS games with a bow. 
And then, at the end of a top 5 list, Arrowhead!🙏

It feels like playing archery on the old Nintendo Wii Sports, I love it!

This is very much a chill, realistic game with great mechanics and physics. You'll get to blow off some steam and get a nice arm workout with no flashing light, loud bangs or other BS!

It's basically Medieval Archer Simulator and it's done right!

Much love to the devs, I'm only on Area 3 but I can see myself getting to 12 rather quickly.

Please put out more content if you can, don't let the game die. Launch some DLCs if you need, I'll buy them. I wouldn't even mind modern compound bows. Or if you want to keep historical, add historical bows from different countries, different years, with little descriptions, different perks from other bows to make them unique, not just a different skin.

Also, timed leaderboards, something to keep people coming back.

Turn based multiplayer?

Anyway, yep, love it, keep it up, I'll sure keep an eye out for updates!

10/10

reviews.review_title: Move over Robin Hood, I've got this...
reviews.review_description:
I bought this on the first day it was released and since then it has been my go-to game for fun.  When hitting a pumpkin with an arrow it sounds like the real thing.  There are 13 locations to earn and open up and each location has 15 challenges that get harder and harder as you progress.  The last time I shot a real arrow with a bow was close to 50 years ago, and I was not good at all but after a lot of practice, I started picking up tricks and tips to do much better.  

The objects get smaller, and further away from you as well as more and more items to hit with only three arrows, making it harder and harder to win the round.  If you hit a bullseye you can win additional arrows and in the harder levels, you may need all you can get.  As you earn coins you then can upgrade your bow and arrows for those more difficult challenges. 

It's a fun and challenging game to play.   Hazaa!

THIS GAME SHOULD BE IN THE OCULUS GAME STORE!
Everything works perfectly great job developers, bring on the Deer Hunting with the next mod please ;)

The gradually increasing difficulty is excellent. I love this game so much. It’s a real workout too. Just hard enough that you improve your spatial awareness without getting burned out. I just can’t get enough. Need more!!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games for the Quest.
reviews.review_description: One of the very few games I play regularly on the Quest 2.  How is this not in the normal store?   Shout out to the developers!  Keep up the great work!
It’d be fun if there were enemies to shoot at

This game is simply one of the most addictive games on oculus it is brilliant  the mechanics are superb and it is really quick in terms of starting levels  less than a second between retrying level unlike some games out there  this game is a must for sharp shooter experts there's normal targets moving targets opening and shutting targets ect well worth the money for this game just get it it's great fun  well done whoever made it

It's a fun game but it would be much better if you could invite a friend and share the action. It could be done on several ways like cooperative or take it turns to complete.

Some more music options and wider choice of backgrounds would make the game better
